description: Rich-text DISPLAY element (ActionUIRichText add-on) backed by the RichText package. Renders a whole Markdown document (headings, code blocks, quotes, lists, GFM tables, inline styling, links) into one native text view, selectable and copyable as a single unit. macOS/iOS/visionOS. Driven by the element value or the markdown property.

markdown.description: Markdown source to render (seed for the element value). Empty or nil renders an empty document

baseFontSize.description: Base font point size; omit for Dynamic Type body

syntaxHighlighting.description: Color fenced code blocks by language. Default from the RichText theme

value.description: Current Markdown source; write new Markdown to re-render
